## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss potential collaboration between Winning by Design and Marcel's AI-powered growth services](https://fathom.video/share/cxcs8EJavxwBCERoyNEZvR4yq98yg-EV?tab=summary&timestamp=121.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Marcel's company builds custom AI workflows to augment marketing/growth efforts, leveraging large language models and human expertise](https://fathom.video/share/cxcs8EJavxwBCERoyNEZvR4yq98yg-EV?tab=summary&timestamp=578.0)
  - [Potential use cases discussed include content generation, personalized outreach, lead scoring/ICP building, and enhancing Winning by Design's courses](https://fathom.video/share/cxcs8EJavxwBCERoyNEZvR4yq98yg-EV?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Next step is for Marcel to propose a specific initial engagement to pilot his services with Winning by Design](https://fathom.video/share/cxcs8EJavxwBCERoyNEZvR4yq98yg-EV?tab=summary&timestamp=661.0)

## Topics

### Marcel's AI Workflow Services

  - [Builds custom AI workflows using a low-code platform to automate tasks like content creation, research, personalization](https://fathom.video/share/cxcs8EJavxwBCERoyNEZvR4yq98yg-EV?tab=summary&timestamp=791.0)
  - [Combines large language models, web data, human expertise to produce tailored outputs](https://fathom.video/share/cxcs8EJavxwBCERoyNEZvR4yq98yg-EV?tab=summary&timestamp=765.0)
  - [Aims to build AI capabilities within client organizations over time](https://fathom.video/share/cxcs8EJavxwBCERoyNEZvR4yq98yg-EV?tab=summary&timestamp=1518.0)

### Potential Use Cases for Winning by Design

  - #### Content Generation
      - [Already providing some content automation for clients](https://fathom.video/share/cxcs8EJavxwBCERoyNEZvR4yq98yg-EV?tab=summary&timestamp=38.0)
      - [Could generate educational content, sales materials, etc. for Winning by Design](https://fathom.video/share/cxcs8EJavxwBCERoyNEZvR4yq98yg-EV?tab=summary&timestamp=196.0)
  - #### Personalized Outreach
      - [Using data to create highly customized sales emails/touchpoints](https://fathom.video/share/cxcs8EJavxwBCERoyNEZvR4yq98yg-EV?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)
      - [Ramp is a client leveraging this for automated outbound](https://fathom.video/share/cxcs8EJavxwBCERoyNEZvR4yq98yg-EV?tab=summary&timestamp=1579.0)
  - #### Lead Scoring and ICP Building
      - [Analyze companies, classify fit to ICP based on offerings, buyer profiles](https://fathom.video/share/cxcs8EJavxwBCERoyNEZvR4yq98yg-EV?tab=summary&timestamp=1815.0)
      - [Potentially build out ideal contact list for Winning by Design's tight ICP](https://fathom.video/share/cxcs8EJavxwBCERoyNEZvR4yq98yg-EV?tab=summary&timestamp=1803.0)
  - #### Enhancing Training Courses
      - [Use AI to improve quality and insights in Winning by Design's courses](https://fathom.video/share/cxcs8EJavxwBCERoyNEZvR4yq98yg-EV?tab=summary&timestamp=2025.0)
      - [Guide revenue architects with data-driven recommendations vs. rote playbooks](https://fathom.video/share/cxcs8EJavxwBCERoyNEZvR4yq98yg-EV?tab=summary&timestamp=2015.0)

### Implementation Approach

  - [Start with focused pilot on high-impact use case like ICP building](https://fathom.video/share/cxcs8EJavxwBCERoyNEZvR4yq98yg-EV?tab=summary&timestamp=1933.0)
  - [Marcel's team guides workflow creation, Winning by Design provides expertise](https://fathom.video/share/cxcs8EJavxwBCERoyNEZvR4yq98yg-EV?tab=summary&timestamp=1920.0)
  - [Aim to transfer AI workflow skills to Winning by Design's team over time](https://fathom.video/share/cxcs8EJavxwBCERoyNEZvR4yq98yg-EV?tab=summary&timestamp=1936.0)
  - [Structured as a service engagement, with potential to expand](https://fathom.video/share/cxcs8EJavxwBCERoyNEZvR4yq98yg-EV?tab=summary&timestamp=1655.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel will put together a specific proposal for an initial engagement](https://fathom.video/share/cxcs8EJavxwBCERoyNEZvR4yq98yg-EV?tab=summary&timestamp=2040.0)
  - [Regroup to discuss the proposal and decide on next steps](https://fathom.video/share/cxcs8EJavxwBCERoyNEZvR4yq98yg-EV?tab=summary&timestamp=2073.0)
  - Explore potential for fractional CMO support separately
